Package org.key_project.util.java

Class SwingUtil

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.java.SwingUtil
public final class SwingUtil extends Object
Utilities for working with Swing.

    Method
    Description

    browse(URI uri)
    Wrapper for Desktop.browse(URI) that also works on Linux.

  • Field Details

    • LOGGER

      public static final org.slf4j.Logger LOGGER

  • Method Details

    • browse

      public static void browse(URI uri) throws IOException
      Wrapper for Desktop.browse(URI) that also works on Linux.
      Parameters:
      uri - the URI to be displayed in the user's default browser
      Throws:
      IOException

    • browseIsSupported

      public static boolean browseIsSupported()
      Wrapper for Desktop.isSupported(Desktop.Action) BROWSE that always returns true on Linux.
      Returns:
      whether BROWSE is supported
      See Also:
      • browse(URI)

    • findComponent

      public static <T> T findComponent(Container container, Class<T> classToFind)
      Find a component of the specified class in the container. This will search the view hierarchy recursively.
      Type Parameters:
      T - class of the component
      Parameters:
      container - container to search in
      classToFind - class to look for
      Returns:
      the object if found, otherwise null

    • findAllComponents

      public static <T> List<T> findAllComponents(Container container, Class<T> classToFind)
      Find all components of the specified class in the container. This will search the view hierarchy recursively and is limited to "visible" elements (on screen or on visible tab).
      Type Parameters:
      T - class of the component
      Parameters:
      container - container to search in
      classToFind - class to look for
      Returns:
      the object(s) if found (may be empty)

    • getAllOpenWindows

      public static Collection<Window> getAllOpenWindows()

    • getPopups

      public static List<JPopupMenu> getPopups()

    • createScrollPane

      public static JScrollPane createScrollPane(JTable table)
      Create a scroll pane around the given table. It will always have vertical and horizontal scroll bars.
      Parameters:
      table - the table
      Returns:
      the scroll pane

    • setFont

      public static void setFont(JComponent component, Font font)
      Set the provided font on the component and recursively on all children components.
      Parameters:
      component - the component
      font - the font

    • showNotification

      public static void showNotification(String title, String text)
      Show a desktop notification to the user.
      Parameters:
      title - title of the notification
      text - text of the notification
